items.description: Detect IBAN-formatted bank account numbers from any country and replace them with a redacted placeholder.
items.name: Bank Account Number (IBAN)

items.description: Detect credit card numbers and replace them with a redacted placeholder.
items.name: Credit Card Number

items.description: Detect email addresses and replace them with a redacted placeholder.
items.name: Email Address

items.description: Detect IPv4 addresses and replace each one with its /24 subnet.
items.name: IPv4 Address

items.description: Detect IPv6 addresses, expanded or compressed, and replace each one with its /48 prefix.
items.name: IPv6 Address

items.description: Detect Dutch BSN identification numbers and replace them with a redacted placeholder.
items.name: National ID (BSN)

items.description: Detect Spanish DNI and NIF identification numbers and replace them with a redacted placeholder.
items.name: National ID (DNI and NIF)

items.description: Detect US Social Security numbers and replace them with a redacted placeholder.
items.name: National ID (SSN)

items.description: Detect phone numbers in international format and replace them with a redacted placeholder.
items.name: Phone Number
